resources.string:
Z.A.R.A. Guardian Mode provides intelligent security monitoring: 

• Detects unauthorized access attempts on lock screen 
• Captures intruder photos using front camera 
• Sends alerts to your trusted contacts via email 
• Auto-types generated code into any text editor 
• Tracks device location for safety monitoring 

Privacy Notice: Z.A.R.A. processes data locally on your device. No personal information is uploaded without your explicit consent. Accessibility permissions are used only for security features you enable.
Security alerts, intruder detection, and system notifications
Z.A.R.A. captured a photo. Tap to review and send alerts.
Z.A.R.A. needs camera access to capture intruder photos for your security. This is only used when Guardian Mode detects unauthorized access.
Z.A.R.A. needs location access to track your device and send location-based alerts. Your location is never shared without your consent.
Z.A.R.A. needs storage access to save intruder photos and access files for analysis. Files are processed locally on your device.
Z.A.R.A. needs notification permission to send you real-time security alerts. You can disable these anytime in Settings.
Z.A.R.A. needs Accessibility permission for Guardian Mode security monitoring and auto-type assistance. This permission is only used for features you explicitly enable.
⚠️ Permission denied. Enable in Settings for full protection.
⚠️ API Key required. Configure in Settings to activate Z.A.R.A.
❌ Camera error: Could not capture photo
❌ Location error: Could not get coordinates
❌ Email error: Could not send alert
❌ API error: Check your API key in Settings
❌ Permission error: Enable required permissions in Settings
Free AI models via OpenRouter.ai — No credit card needed. Recommended for testing.
Direct Google Gemini API — Requires Google Cloud billing setup. Best for production.
© 2024 Z.A.R.A. Project • Made with ❤️ for Sir
